gpu: ATI Technologies Inc. AMD Radeon R7 200
notes:
Game exits when main menu is displayed. Error: dbus[15137]: arguments to dbus_connection_unref() were incorrect, assertion "connection->generation == _dbus_current_generation" failed in file ../../../dbus/dbus-connection.c line 2822.

Runs well with option "LC_ALL=C DBUS_FATAL_WARNINGS=0 LD_LIBRARY_PATH="/usr/lib:/usr/local/lib" %command%"
title: Worms W.M.D

notes: Game doesn't work for me native, but it does on Proton out of the box.
title: Worms W.M.D

notes:
Mutiplayer online tested (private room). Performance felt native. This game linux wise only works on ubuntu and one other I heard and it was crashing for me on launch for native.(On debian 10). For windows version / Proton, Game at launch will play first video but then go black on the 2nd and 3rd, then go to main menu per normal. (That's the only minor issue I found) 
No special wine settings or commands were used.
title: Worms W.M.D

notes:
had to export libraries to get it to launch at all, worked perfect after i did that!
Open terminal window and paste this command: "export STEAM_RUNTIME_PREFER_HOST_LIBRARIES=0"
After that, just type : "steam"

Remember to completely shut down steam before running commands
title: Worms W.M.D
